Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. gene_activity_assay Name gene activity assay used provide shared feature space RNA-ATAC integration. Default `"ACTIVITY"`. title: NMF similarity heatmap — NMFHeatmap
text: srt Seurat object containing NMF dimensional reduction. plot_type Plot type. "cells" plots cell/spot similarity NMF embeddings. "features" plots feature similarity NMF loadings. reduction Name NMF reduction. Default "nmf". dims Dimensions/components NMF reduction use. NULL, available dimensions used. cells Cells/spots include plot_type = "cells". features Features include plot_type = "features". NULL, variable features shared loading matrix used; none found, features loading matrix used. similarity_metric Similarity metric. cell_annotation Metadata columns show column annotations cell mode. feature_annotation Feature metadata columns show column annotations feature mode. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. border Whether add border heatmap. Default TRUE. show_row_names Whether show row names heatmap. Default FALSE. show_column_names Whether show column names heatmap. Default FALSE. row_names_side character vector specifying side place row names. column_names_side character vector specifying side place column names. row_names_rot rotation angle row names. Default 0. column_names_rot rotation angle column names. Default 90. row_title character vector specifying title rows. Default NULL. column_title character vector specifying title columns. Default NULL. anno_terms Whether include term annotations. Default FALSE. anno_keys Whether include key annotations. Default FALSE. anno_features Whether include feature annotations. Default FALSE. terms_width unit specifying width term annotations. Default unit(4, ""). terms_fontsize numeric vector specifying font size(s) term annotations. Default 8. keys_width unit specifying width key annotations. Default unit(2, ""). keys_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) key annotations. Default c(6, 10). features_width unit specifying width feature annotations. Default unit(2, ""). features_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) feature annotations. Default c(6, 10). IDtype character vector specifying type IDs features. Default "symbol". species character vector specifying species features. Default "Homo_sapiens". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether use combined database. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror character vector specifying mirror Ensembl database. Default NULL. db character vector specifying database use. Default "GO_BP". TERM2GENE data.frame specifying TERM2GENE mapping database. Default NULL. TERM2NAME data.frame specifying TERM2NAME mapping database. Default NULL. minGSSize integer specifying minimum gene set size database. Default 10. maxGSSize integer specifying maximum gene set size database. Default 500. GO_simplify Whether simplify gene ontology terms. Default FALSE. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying cutoff GO simplification. Default "p.adjust < 0.05". simplify_method character vector specifying method GO simplification. Default "Wang". simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff GO simplification. Default 0.7. pvalueCutoff numeric vector specifying p-value cutoff(s) significance. Default NULL. padjustCutoff adjusted p-value cutoff significance. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms include. Default 5. show_termid Whether show term IDs. Default FALSE. topWord number top words include. Default 20. words_excluded character vector specifying words exclude. Default NULL. heatmap_palette character vector specifying palette use heatmap. Default "RdBu". heatmap_palcolor character vector specifying heatmap color use. Default NULL. heatmap_limits Numeric breaks heatmap color scale. NULL, defaults c(0, 0.35, 0.75, 1). cluster_palette Palette used NMF cluster/program annotations. cluster_palcolor Optional custom colors NMF cluster/program annotations. cell_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use cell annotations. length vector match number cell_annotation. Default "Chinese". cell_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying cell annotation color(s) use. length list match number cell_annotation. Default NULL. feature_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use feature annotations. length vector match number feature_annotation. Default "Dark2". feature_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying feature annotation color use. length list match number feature_annotation. Default NULL. use_raster Whether use raster device plotting. Default NULL. raster_device character vector specifying raster device use. Default "png". raster_by_magick Whether use 'magick' package raster. Default FALSE. height height heatmap specified units. provided, height automatically determined based number rows heatmap default unit. width width heatmap specified units. provided, width automatically determined based number columns heatmap default unit. units units use width height heatmap. Default "inch", Options "mm", "cm", "inch". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. legend.position character vector specifying side place legends. Options "right", "left", "top", "bottom". Default "right". row names long shown right side, gap heatmap legend automatically increased avoid overlap. ht_params Additional parameters customize appearance heatmap. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: NMF similarity heatmap — NMFHeatmap
text: list following elements: plot: heatmap plot patchwork/ggplot object. similarity_matrix: ordered similarity matrix used plotting. nmf_cluster: ordered NMF cluster/program assignment. order: ordered row/column names. metadata: Ordered cell feature metadata used annotations. enrichment: Enrichment results feature mode requested, otherwise NULL.

title: NMF similarity heatmap — NMFHeatmap
code: library(Matrix) data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- Seurat::NormalizeData(pancreas_sub, verbose = FALSE) pancreas_sub <- Seurat::FindVariableFeatures(   pancreas_sub,   nfeatures = 1000,   verbose = FALSE ) pancreas_sub <- RunNMF(   pancreas_sub,   features = SeuratObject::VariableFeatures(pancreas_sub),   nbes = 5,   maxit = 50,   verbose = FALSE ) ht_cells <- NMFHeatmap(   pancreas_sub,   plot_type = "cells",   cell_annotation = "CellType",   width = 3,   height = 0.5 ) ht_cells$plot  ht_features <- NMFHeatmap(   pancreas_sub,   plot_type = "features",   width = 3,   height = 0.5 ) ht_features$plot

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
text: function generates PAGA plot based given Seurat object PAGA result.

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
code: PAGAPlot(   srt,   paga = srt@misc$paga,   type = "connectivities",   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   show_transition = FALSE,   node_palette = "Chinese",   node_palcolor = NULL,   node_size = 4,   node_alpha = 1,   node_highlight = NULL,   node_highlight_color = "red",   label = FALSE,   label.size = 3.5,   label.fg = "white",   label.bg = "black",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label_insitu = FALSE,   label_repel = FALSE,   label_repulsion = 20,   label_point_size = 1,   label_point_color = "black",   label_segment_color = "black",   edge_threshold = 0.01,   edge_line = c("straight", "curved"),   edge_line_curvature = 0.3,   edge_line_angle = 90,   edge_size = c(0.2, 1),   edge_color = "grey40",   edge_alpha = 0.5,   edge_shorten = 0,   edge_offset = 0,   edge_highlight = NULL,   edge_highlight_color = "red",   transition_threshold = 0.01,   transition_line = c("straight", "curved"),   transition_line_curvature = 0.3,   transition_line_angle = 90,   transition_size = c(0.2, 1),   transition_color = "black",   transition_alpha = 1,   transition_arrow_type = "closed",   transition_arrow_angle = 20,   transition_arrow_length = grid::unit(0.02, "npc"),   transition_shorten = 0.05,   transition_offset = 0,   transition_highlight = NULL,   transition_highlight_color = "red",   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "PAGA",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
text: srt Seurat object. paga PAGA result Seurat object. Default srt@misc$paga. type type plot generate. Possible values "connectivities" (default) "connectivities_tree". reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. show_transition Whether display transitions different cell states. Default FALSE. node_palette character vector specifying name color palette node groups. node_palcolor character vector specifying names colors node group. node_size numeric value column name node specifying size nodes. node_alpha numeric value column name node specifying transparency nodes. node_highlight character vector specifying names nodes highlight. node_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting nodes. label Whether label cell groups. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color label. label.bg Background color label. label.bg.r Background ratio label. label_insitu Whether place raw labels (group names) center cells corresponding group. Default FALSE, using numbers instead raw labels. label_repel Logical value indicating whether label repel away center points. label_repulsion Force repulsion overlapping text labels. Default 20. label_point_size Size center points. label_point_color Color center points. label_segment_color Color line segment labels. edge_threshold threshold removing edges. edge_line character vector specifying type line edges (straight, curved). edge_line_curvature curvature curved edges. edge_line_angle angle curved edges. edge_size Size edges. edge_color Color edges. edge_alpha Transparency edges. edge_shorten length edge shorten. edge_offset length edge offset. edge_highlight character vector specifying names edges highlight. edge_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting edges. transition_threshold threshold removing transitions. transition_line character vector specifying type line transitions (straight, curved). transition_line_curvature curvature curved transitions. transition_line_angle angle curved transitions. transition_size numeric vector specifying range transition sizes. transition_color character vector specifying color transitions. transition_alpha transparency transitions. transition_arrow_type character vector specifying type arrow transitions (closed, open). transition_arrow_angle angle transition arrow. transition_arrow_length length transition arrow. transition_shorten length transition shorten. transition_offset length transition offset. transition_highlight character vector specifying names transitions highlight. transition_highlight_color character vector specifying color highlighting transitions. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default "PAGA". subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: PAGA plot — PAGAPlot
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPAGA(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   backend = "cpp",   return_seurat = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(pancreas_sub)  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   type = "connectivities_tree" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "PCA" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_shorten = 0.05 )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   label = TRUE,   label_insitu = TRUE,   label_repel = TRUE )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_line = "curved" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   node_size = "GroupSize" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   node_highlight = "Ductal" )  PAGAPlot(   pancreas_sub,   edge_highlight = paste(     "Pre-endocrine",     levels(pancreas_sub$SubCellType),     sep = "-"   ) )

title: Plot Palantir trajectories — PalantirTrajectoryPlot
text: Plot branch-aware Palantir trajectories two-dimensional embedding.

title: Plot Palantir trajectories — PalantirTrajectoryPlot
code: PalantirTrajectoryPlot(   srt,   reduction = NULL,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   pseudotime_key = "palantir_pseudotime",   branch_cols = NULL,   diff_potential_key = "palantir_diff_potential",   pseudotime_interval = c(0, 1),   branch_min_prob = 0.05,   n_bins = 60,   min_cells_per_bin = 3,   smooth = TRUE,   trajectory_method = c("loess", "bin"),   smoothness = 1,   span = 0.75,   n_path_points = 200,   cell_color = "pseudotime",   pt.size = 0.5,   pt.alpha = 0.8,   palette = "Dark2",   palcolor = NULL,   trajectory_palette = "Dark2",   trajectory_palcolor = NULL,   trajectory_linewidth = 1.2,   trajectory_bg = "black",   trajectory_bg_stroke = 0.7,   trajectory_arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.12, "inches"), type = "closed"),   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "Palantir",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Plot Palantir trajectories — PalantirTrajectoryPlot
text: srt Seurat object. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. pseudotime_key Name metadata column containing Palantir pseudotime. branch_cols Metadata columns containing Palantir branch probabilities. NULL, columns ending "_diff_potential" used, excluding pseudotime_key diff_potential_key. diff_potential_key Name Palantir entropy/differentiation potential column exclude branch auto-detection. pseudotime_interval Numeric vector length 2 specifying pseudotime range plot. branch_min_prob Minimum branch probability used select cells branch trajectory. n_bins Number pseudotime bins used summarize trajectory. min_cells_per_bin Minimum number cells required bin. smooth Whether smooth trajectory stats::loess. trajectory_method Method used fit trajectory coordinates along pseudotime. "loess" uses fully R-native smoother Palantir-style pseudotime grid; "bin" uses binned median coordinates. smoothness Smoothing multiplier R-native loess span. Higher values yield smoother curves. span Base span used loess smoothing. n_path_points Number pseudotime points used draw smoothed trajectory. cell_color Cell coloring mode. Use "pseudotime" Palantir pseudotime, "branch_selection" branch highest probability, "none" hide cell coloring, metadata column. pt.size Point size cells. pt.alpha Point alpha cells. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. trajectory_palette Color palette trajectories. trajectory_palcolor Custom colors trajectories. trajectory_linewidth Line width trajectories. trajectory_bg Color trajectory background stroke. trajectory_bg_stroke Width added trajectory background stroke. trajectory_arrow Arrow used trajectories. See grid::arrow. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Logical. TRUE, returns ggplot2 layers instead complete plot. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Plot Palantir trajectories — PalantirTrajectoryPlot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPalantir(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   early_group = "Ductal",   terminal_groups = c("Alpha", "Beta", "Delta", "Epsilon") ) PalantirTrajectoryPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   pseudotime_interval = c(0, 0.9) ) PalantirTrajectoryPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   cell_color = "branch_selection",   pseudotime_interval = c(0, 0.9) ) } # }

what: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: function prepares gene annotation databases given species set annotation sources. retrieves necessary information various annotation packages external resources organizes list. list contains annotation data specified annotation source.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
code: PrepareDB(   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   db = c("GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM",     "MP", "DO", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink",     "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat",     "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2"),   db_IDtypes = c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"),   db_version = "latest",   db_update = FALSE,   data_dir = NULL,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   custom_TERM2GENE = NULL,   custom_TERM2NAME = NULL,   custom_species = NULL,   custom_IDtype = NULL,   custom_version = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". MSigDB subcollections can requested "MSigDB_<collection>", "MSigDB_H" human Hallmark "MSigDB_MH" mouse Hallmark. Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_IDtypes character vector specifying desired ID types used gene identifiers gene annotation databases. Default c("symbol", "entrez_id", "ensembl_id"). db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. data_dir local directory named list local paths containing manually downloaded database source files. directory provided, PrepareDB first searches data_dir/<db>/, data_dir. Named lists can override database path, e.g. list(MSigDB = "~/db/msigdb"). convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". biomart name BioMart database want connect . Possible options include "ensembl", "protists_mart", "fungi_mart", "plants_mart". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. custom_TERM2GENE data frame containing custom TERM2GENE mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_TERM2NAME data frame containing custom TERM2NAME mapping specified species annotation source. Default NULL. custom_species character vector specifying species name used custom database. Default NULL. custom_IDtype character vector specifying ID type used custom database. Default NULL. custom_version character vector specifying version used custom database. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Passed functions.

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
text: list containing prepared gene annotation databases: TERM2GENE: mapping gene identifiers terms. TERM2NAME: mapping terms names. semData: semantic similarity data gene sets (Gene Ontology terms).

title: Prepare the gene annotation databases — PrepareDB
code: db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP" ) ListDB(   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP" ) head(   db_list[["Homo_sapiens"]][["GO_BP"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )  # Based on homologous gene conversion, # prepare a gene annotation database that originally does not exist in the species. if (interactive()) {   db_list <- PrepareDB(     species = "Homo_sapiens",     db = "MP"   )   ListDB(     species = "Homo_sapiens",     db = "MP"   )   head(     db_list[["Homo_sapiens"]][["MP"]][["TERM2GENE"]]   ) }  # You can also build a custom database based on the gene sets you have ccgenes <- CycGenePrefetch("Homo_sapiens") custom_TERM2GENE <- rbind(   data.frame(     term = "S_genes",     gene = ccgenes[["cc_S_genes"]]   ),   data.frame(     term = "G2M_genes",     gene = ccgenes[["cc_G2M_genes"]]   ) ) str(custom_TERM2GENE)  # Set convert_species = TRUE to build a custom database for both species, # with the name "CellCycle" db_list <- PrepareDB(   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   db = "CellCycle",   convert_species = TRUE,   custom_TERM2GENE = custom_TERM2GENE,   custom_species = "Homo_sapiens",   custom_IDtype = "symbol",   custom_version = "Seurat_v5" ) ListDB(db = "CellCycle")  db_list <- PrepareDB(species = "Mus_musculus", db = "CellCycle") head(   db_list[["Mus_musculus"]][["CellCycle"]][["TERM2GENE"]] )

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: Prepare python environment installing required dependencies setting environment.

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
code: PrepareEnv(   envname = NULL,   conda = "auto",   miniconda_repo = "https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda",   version = if (is_windows()) "3.11-1" else "3.10-1",   force = FALSE,   modules = NULL,   pip_options = character(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Prepare the python environment — PrepareEnv
text: envname name conda-compatible Python environment. NULL, environment name set "scop_env". Default NULL. conda path command name conda-compatible executable (conda, mamba, micromamba). Use "auto" allow automatically finding appropriate environment manager. "micromamba" requested micromamba available PATH, package-managed micromamba downloaded automatically. miniconda_repo Repository URL miniconda. Default https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda. version Python version. Default "3.10-1" macOS Unix "3.11-1" Windows. force Whether force recreation environment. TRUE, existing environment removed recreated. Default FALSE. modules Optional Python dependency modules install addition default scientific stack. Supported values "scanpy", "scvi", "glue", "scanorama", "bbknn", "celltypist", "cellphonedb", "magic", "scrublet", "sccoda", "doubletdetection", "doublet", "palantir", "scvelo", "cellrank", "wot", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "multimap", "scomm", "scenic", "seacells", "tage". NULL omitted PrepareEnv(), default environment installed. default excludes "sccoda" "scomm" TensorFlow stacks compatible default JAX/scVI stack environment; request explicitly scCODA/scOMM workflows. "scenic" also excluded default environment prepared "scenic_env" default SCENIC requires older Python/numpy stack. Windows, default also excludes "scvi", "glue", "multimap" upstream stacks reliable requested explicitly method-specific workflows. pip_options Additional command line arguments passed uv/pip installing pip packages. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed package installation functions.

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
code: ProjectionPlot(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_reduction = "ref.embeddings",   ref_reduction = srt_query[[query_reduction]]@misc[["reduction.model"]] %||% NULL,   query_param = list(palette = "Set1", cells.highlight = TRUE),   ref_param = list(palette = "Chinese"),   xlim = NULL,   ylim = NULL,   pt.size = 0.8,   stroke.highlight = 0.5,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_group grouping variable query group cells. ref_group grouping variable reference group cells. query_reduction name reduction query group cells. ref_reduction name reduction reference group cells. query_param list parameters customizing query group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). ref_param list parameters customizing reference group plot. Available parameters: palette (color palette groups) cells.highlight (whether highlight cells). xlim x-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. ylim y-axis limits plot. provided, limits calculated based data. pt.size size points plot. stroke.highlight size stroke highlight cells. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Projection Plot — ProjectionPlot
code: data(panc8_sub) panc8_sub <- standard_scop(panc8_sub) srt_ref <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech != "fluidigmc1"] srt_query <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech == "fluidigmc1"] srt_ref <- integration_scop(   srt_ref,   batch = "tech",   integration_method = "Uncorrected" ) CellDimPlot(   srt_ref,   group.by = c("celltype", "tech") )  # Projection srt_query <- RunKNNMap(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   ref_umap = "UncorrectedUMAP2D" ) ProjectionPlot(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   query_group = "celltype",   ref_group = "celltype" )

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: Generate differential-abundance plots based results RunProportionTest. Supports legacy storage method-layer storage multi-method proportion-test workflow.

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
code: ProportionTestPlot(   srt,   comparison = NULL,   proportion_method = NULL,   result_level = c("group"),   plot_type = c("effect", "umap"),   umap_mode = c("discrete", "continuous"),   reduction = "UMAP",   projection_args = list(),   FDR_threshold = 0.05,   log2FD_threshold = log2(1.5),   order_by = c("value", "name"),   palette = "RdBu",   palcolor = NULL,   group_palette = "Chinese",   group_palcolor = NULL,   pt.size = 1,   pt.alpha = 1,   cols.sig = "red",   cols.ns = "grey",   cols.increase = "#d7301f",   cols.decrease = "#2b8cbe",   effect_color_mode = c("directional", "classic"),   nlabel = 5,   features_label = NULL,   label = FALSE,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label.size = 4,   aspect.ratio = NULL,   xlab = "Cell Type",   ylab = "log2 (FD)",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   legend.position = "bottom",   legend.direction = "vertical",   legend.title = "Significance",   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Proportion Test Plot — ProportionTestPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing proportion-test results. comparison character string specifying comparison plot. NULL, plots comparisons. proportion_method Optional method select srt@tools[['ProportionTest']][['methods']]. NULL, uses active/recent method. result_level Result level draw. Currently "group" used. plot_type Plot type. One "effect" "umap". umap_mode UMAP projection mode plot_type = "umap". "discrete" maps cells DA direction categories; "continuous" maps cells group-level obs_log2FD. reduction Reduction name used UMAP projection. projection_args Additional arguments passed CellDimPlot (umap_mode = "discrete") FeatureDimPlot (umap_mode = "continuous"). FDR_threshold FDR value cutoff significance. log2FD_threshold Absolute value log2FD cutoff significance. order_by Method order clusters. Options: "name" (alphabetical), "value" (log2FD value). palette Color palette name continuous effect coloring. palcolor Custom colors palette. group_palette Palette cluster/group coloring. group_palcolor Custom colors group_palette. pt.size size points. pt.alpha Point transparency. cols.sig Color significant/credible points intervals. cols.ns Color non-significant points intervals. cols.increase Default color increased DA groups. cols.decrease Default color decreased DA groups. effect_color_mode Coloring mode plot_type = "effect". Use "directional" (default) increased/decreased/NS colors, "classic" legacy significant/non-significant coloring. nlabel Number labels added label = TRUE features_label = NULL. features_label Character vector specifying points label. label Whether add labels. label.fg Label foreground color. label.bg Label background color. label.bg.r Label background radius. label.size Label text size. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. plot_type = "umap", forwarded projection plot set. ylab character string specifying y-axis label. plot_type = "umap", forwarded projection plot set. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Pseudotime Projection Plot — PseudotimeProjectionPlot
code: PseudotimeProjectionPlot(   srt,   reduction,   time_key,   dims = c(1, 2),   cells = NULL,   method = c("knn", "gradient"),   k = 30,   graph_name = NULL,   plot_type = c("raw", "grid", "stream"),   group.by = NULL,   group_palette = "Chinese",   group_palcolor = NULL,   n_neighbors = ceiling(ncol(srt@assays[[1]])/50),   density = 2,   smooth = 0.5,   scale = 1,   min_mass = 1,   cutoff_perc = 5,   arrow_angle = 20,   arrow_color = "black",   streamline_L = 5,   streamline_minL = 1,   streamline_res = 1,   streamline_n = 15,   streamline_width = c(0, 0.8),   streamline_alpha = 1,   streamline_color = NULL,   streamline_palette = "RdYlBu",   streamline_palcolor = NULL,   streamline_bg_color = "white",   streamline_bg_stroke = 0.5,   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = "Pseudotime projection",   subtitle = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   return_layer = FALSE,   palette = NULL,   palcolor = NULL,   show_cells = TRUE,   pt.size = 2,   pt.alpha = 0.3,   label = NULL,   label.size = 4,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Pseudotime Projection Plot — PseudotimeProjectionPlot
text: srt Seurat object. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. time_key Name column Seurat object metadata containing pseudotime values. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions cells character vector cell names use. method Method compute velocity vectors pseudotime. Can "gradient" "knn". Default "knn". k Number nearest neighbors use method = "knn". Default 30. graph_name Name KNN graph Seurat object use. NULL, new graph computed. Default NULL. plot_type Type plot create. Can "raw", "grid", "stream". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . group_palette Name palette use coloring groups. Defaults "Chinese". group_palcolor Colors use coloring groups. Defaults NULL. n_neighbors Number neighbors include density estimation. Defaults ceiling(ncol(srt@assays[[1]]) / 50). density Scale streamline grid (number points per axis ceiling(50 * density)). Default 2 (CellRank/scvelo-style). smooth Smoothing parameter density estimation. Defaults 0.5. scale Scaling factor velocity vectors. Defaults 1. min_mass Minimum mass value density-based cutoff. Defaults 1. cutoff_perc Percentile value density-based cutoff. Defaults 5. arrow_angle Angle arrowheads. Defaults 20. arrow_color Color arrowheads. Defaults "black". streamline_L Typical length streamline x y units streamline_minL Minimum length segments show. streamline_res Resolution parameter (higher numbers increases resolution). streamline_n Number points draw. streamline_width Size streamline. streamline_alpha Transparency streamline. streamline_color Color streamline. streamline_palette Color palette used streamline. streamline_palcolor Custom colors used streamline. streamline_bg_color Background color streamline. streamline_bg_stroke Border width streamline background. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Defaults "Pseudotime projection". subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). return_layer Whether return plot layers list. Defaults FALSE. palette Deprecated alias group_palette. palcolor Deprecated alias group_palcolor. show_cells Whether show cell points plot. Defaults TRUE. pt.size Size cell points. Defaults 2 (CellRank-style overlapping patches). pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 0.3 (CellRank/scvelo-style). label Whether label cell groups. Defaults TRUE group.specified. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color labels. Defaults "black". label.bg Background color labels. Defaults "white". label.bg.r Background ratio label. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
text: Seurat v5 RPCA integration

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
code: RPCA_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   IntegrateLayers_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Seurat v5 RPCA integration — RPCA_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scaling package ScaleData path. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. IntegrateLayers_params list parameters passed [Seurat::IntegrateLayers]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
text: srt Seurat object. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. trans transformation function applied data presumed log-normalized. min_count Minimum UMI count genes. tolerance recovering raw counts, nCount cell theoretically calculated integer. However, due decimal point preservation normalization, calculated nCount usually floating point number close integer. tolerance difference integer. Default 0.1 sf Set scaling factor manually. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Attempt to recover raw counts from the normalized matrix — RecoverCounts
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) raw_counts <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts" )  # Normalized the data pancreas_sub <- Seurat::NormalizeData(pancreas_sub)  # Now replace counts with the log-normalized data matrix data <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data" ) new_pancreas_sub <- SeuratObject::SetAssayData(   object = pancreas_sub,   layer = "counts",   new.data = data,   assay = "RNA" ) # Recover the counts and compare with the raw counts matrix pancreas_sub <- RecoverCounts(new_pancreas_sub) new_counts <- GetAssayData5(   pancreas_sub,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "counts" ) identical(raw_counts, new_counts)

title: Rename clusters for the Seurat object — RenameClusters
code: data(pancreas_sub)  # Rename all clusters pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) levels(pancreas_sub@meta.data[["SubCellType"]]) <- unique(   pancreas_sub@meta.data[["SubCellType"]] ) pancreas_sub <- RenameClusters(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   nameslist = letters[1:8] ) CellDimPlot(pancreas_sub, "newclusters")  # Rename specified clusters pancreas_sub <- RenameClusters(pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   nameslist = list("a" = "Alpha", "b" = "Beta") ) CellDimPlot(pancreas_sub, "newclusters")  # Merge and rename clusters pancreas_sub <- RenameClusters(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   nameslist = list(     "EndocrineClusters" = c("Alpha", "Beta", "Epsilon", "Delta")   ),   name = "Merged",   keep_levels = TRUE ) CellDimPlot(pancreas_sub, "Merged")

title: Run common cell-cell communication analyses — RunCCC
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . methods Cell-cell communication methods run. Currently supports "CellChat", "CellphoneDB", "LIANA" unified scheduler. NicheNet MultiNicheNet require explicit receiver/sender/contrast design arguments called RunNichenetr() RunMultiNichenetr(). method_params Named list method-specific arguments passed corresponding wrapper. example, use method_params$CellphoneDB$pvalue CellphoneDB-specific parameters. backend Backend used scop post-processing unified CCC table aggregation. upstream CellChat, CellphoneDB, LIANA inference logic unchanged. skip_failed Whether keep running remaining methods one method fails. rebuild_unified Whether rebuild srt@tools[["CCC"]] completed methods requested methods finish. thresh Significance threshold used rebuilding unified CCC tables passed RunCellChat() unless overridden method_params$CellChat. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CIBERSORT deconvolution — RunCIBERSORT

title: Run CIBERSORT deconvolution — RunCIBERSORT
code: RunCIBERSORT(   object = NULL,   count_matrix = NULL,   sig_matrix = "LM22",   bulk_assay = "counts",   perm = 100,   QN = TRUE,   absolute = FALSE,   backend = c("r", "cpp"),   cores = 1L,   seed = 123L,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run CIBERSORT deconvolution — RunCIBERSORT
text: object Optional SummarizedExperiment object expression matrix. SummarizedExperiment provided, results stored metadata(object)[["Deconvolution"]]. count_matrix Optional expression matrix genes rows samples columns. Used object provided matrix. sig_matrix Signature matrix, local file path, "LM22". bulk_assay Assay name object used bulk counts matrix. perm Number CIBERSORT permutations. QN Whether CIBERSORT use quantile normalization. absolute Passed CIBERSORT supported installed package. native C++ backend currently returns relative fractions. backend CIBERSORT backend. "r" calls external CIBERSORT package "cpp" uses native scop LIBSVM implementation. cores Number CPU cores used C++ backend. seed Random seed used C++ permutation backend. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional parameters forwarded internal deconvolution backend.

title: Run CIBERSORT deconvolution — RunCIBERSORT
code: data(islet_bulk)  if (FALSE) { # Run CIBERSORT islet_bulk <- RunCIBERSORT(   object = islet_bulk,   sig_matrix = "LM22",   bulk_assay = "counts",   perm = 100,   QN = TRUE )  # Immune abundance stacked bar plot p1 <- ImmuneAbundancePlot(   object = islet_bulk,   plot_type = "bar",   group.by = "condition" ) p1  # Immune cell correlation heatmap p2 <- ImmuneAbundancePlot(   object = islet_bulk,   plot_type = "cor" ) p2  # Gene-immune correlation butterfly plot p3 <- GeneImmuneCorPlot(   object = islet_bulk,   features = rownames(SummarizedExperiment::assay(islet_bulk, "counts"))[1:3] ) p3 }

title: Run copy-number alteration inference — RunCNV
code: RunCNV(   srt,   method = c("copykat", "fastCNV", "scevan", "infercnv", "numbat", "casper"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   reference.by = NULL,   reference = NULL,   genome = c("hg38", "hg19", "mm10"),   gene_order = NULL,   sample.by = NULL,   allele_counts = NULL,   reference_counts = NULL,   loh = NULL,   loh_name_mapping = NULL,   cytoband = NULL,   output_dir = NULL,   prefix = "CNV",   tool_name = "CNV",   store_matrix = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run copy-number alteration inference — RunCNV
text: srt Seurat object. method CNA/CNV backend. Supported backends "copykat", "fastCNV", "scevan", "infercnv", "numbat", "casper". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Assay layer used expression matrix. group.Optional metadata column forwarded supported backends stored cell annotation. reference.Metadata column identifying reference/normal cells. Required "infercnv" "fastCNV". reference Reference labels reference.. genome Reference genome label. gene_order Gene coordinate table path one. table contain gene, chromosome, start, end columns. NULL, SCOP tries resolve columns assay feature metadata. sample.Optional sample metadata column. allele_counts Allele count table "numbat". forwarded numbat::run_numbat() df_allele. reference_counts Reference expression profile "numbat". forwarded numbat::run_numbat() lambdas_ref. loh B-allele frequency/LOH signal "casper". loh_name_mapping Optional CaSpER LOH--cell mapping table. cytoband Cytoband table "casper". output_dir Optional backend output directory. prefix Prefix metadata columns. tool_name Name used srt@tools. store_matrix Whether store normalized CNV matrix srt@tools[[tool_name]]. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional parameters forwarded selected backend.

title: Run copy-number alteration inference — RunCNV
text: Seurat object CNV metadata columns result bundle srt@tools[[tool_name]].

title: Run copy-number alteration inference — RunCNV
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # copykat uses raw counts and can infer diploid/aneuploid cells directly. srt <- RunCNV(   srt,   method = "copykat",   genome = "hg38" )  # fastCNV and inferCNV require a normal/reference cell annotation. srt <- RunCNV(   srt,   method = "fastCNV",   reference.by = "celltype",   reference = "Normal",   genome = "hg38" )  gene_order <- data.frame(   gene = rownames(srt),   chr = "chr1",   start = seq_len(nrow(srt)) * 1000,   end = seq_len(nrow(srt)) * 1000 + 999 ) srt <- RunCNV(   srt,   method = "infercnv",   reference.by = "celltype",   reference = "Normal",   gene_order = gene_order )  # Numbat and CaSpER require allele-aware inputs from matched DNA/allele # preprocessing workflows. srt <- RunCNV(   srt,   method = "numbat",   allele_counts = df_allele,   reference_counts = lambdas_ref,   genome = "hg38" ) srt <- RunCNV(   srt,   method = "casper",   reference.by = "celltype",   reference = "Normal",   gene_order = gene_order,   loh = baf_signal,   cytoband = cytoband_hg38 )  CNVPlot(srt, plot_type = "heatmap", group.by = "CNV_prediction") CNVPlot(srt, plot_type = "dim", value = "CNV_prediction") } # }

title: Run C-SIDE spatial differential expression — RunCSIDE
code: RunCSIDE(   srt,   rctd_result = NULL,   explanatory.variable = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   condition.by = NULL,   design = NULL,   region_list = NULL,   barcodes = NULL,   mode = c("auto", "single", "regions", "general", "intercept"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   celltypes = NULL,   features = NULL,   prefix = "CSIDE",   tool_name = "CSIDE",   store_results = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run C-SIDE spatial differential expression — RunCSIDE
text: srt Spatial Seurat object used RCTD query. rctd_result Optional old-api spacexr RCTD object. NULL, srt@tools[["RCTD"]]$object RunRCTD() used. explanatory.variable Named numeric vector used spacexr::run.CSIDE.single(). Names must match spatial spot names. group.Metadata column used build C-SIDE regions region_list supplied. condition.Binary metadata column converted 0/1 explanatory variable spacexr::run.CSIDE.single(). design Numeric design matrix used spacexr::run.CSIDE(). Row names must match barcodes spatial spot names. region_list Named list barcode vectors used spacexr::run.CSIDE.regions(). barcodes Barcodes used spacexr::run.CSIDE() spacexr::run.CSIDE.intercept(). NULL, row names design spatial spots used applicable. mode C-SIDE mode. "auto" dispatches "general", "regions", "single", "intercept" based supplied design inputs. assay Assay used srt. NULL, default assay used. layer Assay layer used spatial expression source. celltypes Optional cell types passed C-SIDE cell_types. features Optional features retained normalized result table. C-SIDE still applies gene filtering backend parameters gene_threshold. prefix Prefix metadata columns. tool_name Name used store detailed C-SIDE results srt@tools. store_results Whether store detailed RCTD results srt@tools. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional named parameters passed selected C-SIDE backend, cell_type_threshold, gene_threshold, doublet_mode, cell_type_specific, params_to_test. using stored result RunRCTD() rctd_mode = "full", doublet_mode defaults FALSE unless explicitly supplied.

title: Run C-SIDE spatial differential expression — RunCSIDE
text: Seurat object C-SIDE summary metadata detailed results stored srt@tools[[tool_name]] store_results = TRUE.

title: Run C-SIDE spatial differential expression — RunCSIDE
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(scop)  data(visium_human_pancreas_sub) data(panc8_sub)  spatial <- RunRCTD(   srt = visium_human_pancreas_sub,   reference = panc8_sub,   reference_label = "celltype",   assay = "Spatial",   reference_assay = "RNA",   rctd_mode = "full",   max_cores = 1 )  spatial$region <- ifelse(spatial$col > stats::median(spatial$col), "right", "left") spatial <- RunCSIDE(   spatial,   group.by = "region",   celltypes = c("alpha", "beta"),   gene_threshold = 0.00005,   cell_type_threshold = 125 )  head(spatial@tools$CSIDE$result_table) SpatialSpotPlot(spatial, group.by = "CSIDE_n_sig")  cside_genes <- head(spatial@tools$CSIDE$result_table$feature, 2) SpatialSpotPlot(spatial, features = cside_genes, assay = "Spatial") } # }

what: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping CSS method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: RunCSSMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_css]]@assay.used,   ref_css = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_css name CSS reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. provided, function choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: data(panc8_sub) panc8_sub <- standard_scop(panc8_sub) srt_ref <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech != "fluidigmc1"] srt_query <- panc8_sub[, panc8_sub$tech == "fluidigmc1"] srt_ref <- integration_scop(   srt_ref,   batch = "tech",   integration_method = "CSS" ) CellDimPlot(srt_ref, group.by = c("celltype", "tech"))  # Projection srt_query <- RunCSSMap(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   ref_css = "CSS",   ref_umap = "CSSUMAP2D" ) ProjectionPlot(   srt_query = srt_query,   srt_ref = srt_ref,   query_group = "celltype",   ref_group = "celltype" )

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: srt Seurat object. method Cell cycle estimation method. One "Seurat", "cyclone", "tricycle". assay assay use. Additional arguments passed selected method.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
code: data(pancreas_sub) srt <- pancreas_sub[, 1:80]  if (requireNamespace("scran", quietly = TRUE)) {   srt <- RunCellCycle(     srt,     method = "cyclone",     species = "Mus_musculus",     name = "Cyclone"   ) }  if (requireNamespace("tricycle", quietly = TRUE)) {   srt <- RunCellCycle(     srt,     method = "tricycle",     species = "Mus_musculus",     name = "Tricycle"   )   if ("Cyclone_cyclone_Phase" %in% colnames(srt@meta.data)) {     CellDimPlot(       srt,       reduction = "Tricycle_tricycleEmbedding",       group.by = "Cyclone_cyclone_Phase"     )   }   FeatureDimPlot(     srt,     reduction = "Tricycle_tricycleEmbedding",     features = "Tricycle_tricyclePosition"   ) }

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: Run cell-level quality control

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
code: RunCellQC(   srt,   assay = "RNA",   split.by = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   return_filtered = FALSE,   qc_metrics = c("doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo",     "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"),   db_method = "scDblFinder",   db_rate = NULL,   db_coefficient = 0.01,   decontX_threshold = NULL,   decontX_batch = NULL,   decontX_background = NULL,   decontX_background_assay = NULL,   decontX_bg_batch = NULL,   decontX_assay_name = "decontXcounts",   decontX_store_assay = FALSE,   decontX_round_counts = TRUE,   decontX_args = list(),   atac_args = list(),   outlier_threshold = c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5",     "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"),   outlier_n = 1,   UMI_threshold = 3000,   gene_threshold = 1000,   mito_threshold = 20,   mito_pattern = c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"),   mito_gene = NULL,   ribo_threshold = 50,   ribo_pattern = c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$",     "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"),   ribo_gene = NULL,   ribo_mito_ratio_range = c(1, Inf),   species = NULL,   species_gene_prefix = NULL,   species_percent = 95,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: srt Seurat object. assay name assay used doublet-calling. Default "RNA". split.Name meta.data column used split object QC. Default NULL. specified, QC doublet-calling performed separately within split object merged back afterward. group.Group labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Can NULL, meta.data column name, vector aligned cells. Default NULL. return_filtered Logical indicating whether return cell-filtered Seurat object. Default FALSE. qc_metrics character vector specifying quality control metrics applied. Available metrics "doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species". Default c("doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"). ChromatinAssay, .arg qc_metrics supplied, default "atac". db_method Method used doublet-calling. Can one "scDblFinder", "Scrublet", "DoubletDetection", "scds_cxds", "scds_bcds", "scds_hybrid". resulting doublet labels aggregated afterward db_qc affect thresholds used QC metrics. db_rate expected doublet rate. Default calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * 0.01. db_coefficient coefficient used calculate doublet rate. Default 0.01. Doublet rate calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * db_coefficient. decontX_threshold Optional contamination threshold used filter cells running RunDecontX(). Cells decontX_contamination greater value marked failed decontX_qc. Default NULL, computes decontX results without filtering cells contamination. decontX_batch Batch labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background Optional background / empty-droplet input passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background_assay Assay name used decontX_background Seurat object SingleCellExperiment. Default NULL. decontX_bg_batch Batch labels decontX_background passed RunDecontX(). Default NULL. decontX_assay_name Name assay used store decontaminated counts RunDecontX(). Default "decontXcounts". decontX_store_assay Whether store decontaminated counts new assay running RunDecontX(). Default FALSE. decontX_round_counts Whether round decontaminated counts creating assay RunDecontX(). Default TRUE. decontX_args named list additional advanced arguments passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Explicit decontX_* parameters preferred common options take precedence supplied. Default list(). atac_args named list additional arguments passed RunATACQC() "atac" included qc_metrics. Threshold arguments RunATACQC() used label failed cells atac_qc, filtering deferred RunCellQC(). Default list(). outlier_threshold character vector specifying outlier threshold. Default c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5", "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"). outlier_n Minimum number outlier metrics meet conditions determining outlier cells. Default 1. UMI_threshold UMI number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 3000. gene_threshold Gene number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 1000. mito_threshold Percentage UMI counts mitochondrial genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 20. mito_pattern Regex patterns match mitochondrial genes. Default c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"). mito_gene defined mitochondrial genes. features provided, ignore mito_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_threshold Percentage UMI counts ribosomal genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 50. ribo_pattern Regex patterns match ribosomal genes. Default c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"). ribo_gene defined ribosomal genes. features provided, ignore ribo_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_mito_ratio_range numeric vector specifying range ribosomal/mitochondrial gene expression ratios ribo_mito_ratio outlier cells. Default c(1, Inf). species Species used suffix QC metrics. first species interest. Default NULL. species_gene_prefix Species gene prefix used calculate QC metrics species. Default NULL. species_percent Percentage UMI counts first species. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 95. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunCellQC(   pancreas_sub,   db_method = "scds_cxds" )  CellStatPlot(   pancreas_sub,   stat.by = c(     "db_qc", "outlier_qc"   ),   plot_type = "upset",   stat_level = "Fail" )

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: CellRank toolkit studying cellular dynamics using Markov state modeling.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: RunCellRank(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   cores = 1,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   denoise = FALSE,   kinetics = FALSE,   kernel_type = c("velocity", "pseudotime", "cytotrace", "wot"),   time_key = "dpt_pseudotime",   time_field = "Time",   growth_iters = 3L,   tmap_out = "tmaps/tmap_out",   recalculate = FALSE,   estimator_type = c("GPCCA", "CFLARE"),   use_connectivity_kernel = TRUE,   velocity_weight = 0.8,   connectivity_weight = 0.2,   softmax_scale = 4,   n_macrostates = NULL,   schur_method = c("krylov", "brandts"),   n_cells_terminal = 10,   backward = FALSE,   backend = c("python", "cpp"),   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "cellrank",   legend.position = "on data",   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   dirpath = "./cellrank",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . cores number cores use cellrank. linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_density Amount velocities show. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kernel_type Type kernel use: "velocity" (default, requires spliced/unspliced), "pseudotime" (requires pre-computed pseudotime auto-computes DPT), "cytotrace" (auto-computes CytoTRACE score, suitable RNA-data), "wot" (uses Waddington-OT transport maps CellRank's RealTimeKernel). time_key Key metadata pseudotime. Used kernel_type = "pseudotime". key exist, DPT pseudotime computed automatically. Default "dpt_pseudotime". time_field Key metadata experimental time. Used kernel_type = "wot". growth_iters Number growth iterations passed wot.ot.OTModel. Default 3. tmap_out Directory used store read Waddington-OT transport maps. recalculate Whether recompute Waddington-OT transport maps even tmap_out already exists. Default FALSE. estimator_type Type estimator use: "GPCCA" (default) "CFLARE". GPCCA provides coarse-grained analysis Schur decomposition. use_connectivity_kernel Whether combine main kernel ConnectivityKernel. Default TRUE. velocity_weight Weight VelocityKernel combining ConnectivityKernel. Default 0.8. connectivity_weight Weight ConnectivityKernel combining VelocityKernel. Default 0.2. Weights automatically normalized sum 1.0. softmax_scale Scaling parameter softmax transformation velocity kernel. Default 4. n_macrostates Number macrostates compute. NULL (default), automatically determined based eigenvalue spectrum. schur_method Method Schur decomposition: "krylov" "brandts". used GPCCA estimator. n_cells_terminal Minimum number cells required state considered terminal. Default 10. backward Whether compute backward transitions. Default FALSE. backend Backend computation: "python" (default) "cpp". "cpp", uses native C++ implementation. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

Supported values "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus", "Drosophila_melanogaster". backend cisTarget runtime backend. "python" Uses pySCENIC/ctxcore Python pipeline. tested backend produces results identical official SCENIC. "r" Uses RcisTarget Bioconductor package. Requires cisTarget ranking databases motif annotations available format Python backend (feather files motif2tf table). ranking_dbs Character vector cisTarget ranking feather files. motif_annotations Motif annotation table path (motif2tf). expression_mtx Optional expression matrix path (CSV). NULL backend = "python", expression matrix reconstructed unique genes adj minimal stub. ctx_output Optional output file path cisTarget result. min_regulon_size Minimum number target genes per regulon. gmt_output Optional output path regulon GMT file. txt_output Optional output path regulon TXT file. work_dir Working directory used Python backend. prefix Prefix output files. data_dir Directory used cache automatically prepared SCENIC reference files. NULL, files stored tools::R_user_dir("scop", "data")/SCENIC/<species>. envname Python environment name (Python backend ). conda Conda-compatible executable (Python backend ). prepare_env Whether prepare Python environment. cores Number workers. force Whether rebuild existing outputs. verbose Whether print progress messages. ... Additional arguments passed backend.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: Predicts cellular developmental potential single-cell RNA-seq data using CytoTRACE 2 algorithm (Kang et al., 2025). default, function uses native scop R/C++ implementation. Set backend = "r" call official CytoTRACE2 R package. algorithm consists five stages: Preprocessing: Gene orthology mapping, feature selection, ranking, log2-CPM transformation. GSBN Ensemble Prediction: 19 pre-trained Gene Set Binary Network models predict continuous developmental potency score (0-1) discrete potency category. Diffusion Smoothing: Markov random-walk--restart cell-cell similarity graph smooths raw scores. Binning: Within potency category, cells ranked linearly scaled corresponding segments unit interval. Adaptive kNN Smoothing: PCA-based nearest-neighbor consensus refinement final scores.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
code: RunCytoTRACE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunCytoTRACE(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = c("counts", "data"),   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   compute_knn_smoothing = TRUE,   cores = 1,   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunCytoTRACE(   object,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   compute_knn_smoothing = TRUE,   cores = 1,   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object (genes rows, cells columns). ... Additional arguments passed official CytoTRACE2::cytotrace2() call backend = "r". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default "counts". species species input data. Currently supported values "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". Default "Homo_sapiens". batch_size number cells process . datasets cells value, cells randomly split batches processed independently. batching NULL. Default 10000. smooth_batch_size number cells per subsample diffusion smoothing step. diffusion subsampling NULL. Default 1000. compute_knn_smoothing Whether run final PCA-based adaptive kNN smoothing step. Set FALSE faster score using pre-kNN binned CytoTRACE2 output. cores Number cores parallel processing. Default 1. backend Backend used run CytoTRACE2. "cpp" uses native scop R/C++ backend default. "r" calls official CytoTRACE2::cytotrace2() implementation. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 14. data_dir Path directory containing CytoTRACE2 model data files. Used backend = "cpp". NULL, uses model data prepared PrepareDB(db = "CytoTRACE2"). Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: input Seurat object, function returns Seurat object following metadata columns added: CytoTRACE2_Score: final predicted cellular potency score (0-1) CytoTRACE2_Potency: final predicted cellular potency category (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) CytoTRACE2_Relative: predicted relative order (normalized 0-1) preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Score: potency score KNN smoothing preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Potency: potency category KNN smoothing input matrix data.frame, function returns data.frame columns , cell IDs row names.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE

Commercial entities wishing use software contact Stanford University's Office Technology Licensing (docket S24-057). See https://github.com/mengxu98/datasets/blob/main/CytoTRACE2/LICENSE complete terms.
