title: scop 0.9.0
text: FeatureStatPlot() ExpressionStatPlot(): Added auto_comparison automatically compare group highest median statistic groups, explicit ref_group comparisons still taking precedence. GSVAPlot() now supports mode = "diff" true two-group pathway activity tests sample-aggregated GSVA scores, keeping original score plotting behavior default. Non-heatmap score-mode p-value columns documented score-derived plotting placeholders, statistical significance. Added ClusterTreePlot() SCOP-styled visualization Seurat multi-resolution clustering trees, including automatic *_snn_res.* metadata detection, prefix/resolution filtering, edge contribution statistics, marker-expression overlays. Added optional support BPCells-backed Seurat v5 assay layers GetAssayData5(), CheckDataType(), RunSpotQC(), RunCellQC(), dimension-reduction variance filtering. BPCells remains Suggests dependency detected runtime source installs require HDF5/C++17 unless users opt BPCells-backed matrices. Added RunCNV() unified CNV workflow Seurat objects, runtime-optional copykat, infercnv, SCEVAN, fastCNV backends, standardized result storage srt@tools[["CNV"]], metadata writeback, CNVPlot() heatmap, embedding, spatial, composition-bar, tree visualizations. Added RunESTIMATE() tumor microenvironment scoring Seurat, SummarizedExperiment, matrix inputs, including stromal, immune, ESTIMATE, tumor-purity scores, Seurat metadata writeback, EstimateScorePlot() / EstimateGenePlot() visualization helpers. RunMetabolism(): Gene sets now built via PrepareDB() default (use_preparedb = TRUE) species-aware gene mapping BioMart KEGG/Reactome databases. species parameter now automatically converts human gene symbols target species. scMetabolism-curated pathway lists cross-referenced PrepareDB TERM2GENE mouse data receives mouse gene symbols directly. previous GMT-path still available use_preparedb = FALSE. RunMetabolism(): convert_species now defaults TRUE, enabling automatic GeneConvert() cross-species ortholog mapping species differs "Homo_sapiens". Added RunSCENICPlus() SCENIC+ multi-omics workflow Seurat objects, direct Python launcher, parallelized processing, result readback. Added RunGRNBoost2() RunGENIE3() standalone GRN modules wrapping Arboreto Python implementations, Seurat/matrix methods scenic_flt_adj() target filtering shared RunSCENIC(). Added RunCisTarget() standalone cisTarget motif enrichment regulon construction TF-target tables, Python R execution paths. PrepareDB(): Added data_dir parse locally downloaded single-file database sources (Broad MSigDB JSON, CSPA, Surfaceome, SPRomeDB, CORUM, JASPAR, ENCODE, TFLink, hTFtarget, TRRUST, CellTalk, CellChat) reusable R.cache database cache, avoiding repeated downloads. GeneSetScoring(): Added C++ backends zscore_dense() plage_dense() Z-score PLAGE gene-set scoring, plus PLAGE score orientation via z-score dot product deterministic SVD signs. ssgsea_rank_dense() now accepts normalize parameter. aucell_auc_sparse() gained sparse ctxcore algorithm option. RunSCENIC(): Added genome parameter automatic cisTarget reference selection keeping species aligned package-wide Latin-name convention. Human references now support default "hg38" v10 databases "hg19" v9 databases, human TF list cached genome-neutral name allTFs_hgnc.txt. RunSCENIC(): Inlined single-call scenic_grn_inputs_changed helper; shortened long internal function names (scenic_dl_refs, scenic_flt_adj, scenic_def_mc, scenic_sel_mc_res, scenic_prep_gene_arg) synced cross-file calls RunGRN.R. RunSCENICPlus(): Inlined single-call helpers scenicplus_read_optional_table, scenicplus_motif_tf_names, scenicplus_eregulon_table; removed unused scenicplus_eregulons. FeatureHeatmap(), DynamicHeatmap(), GroupHeatmap(): Compact long multi-term feature annotations databases MSigDB Reactome drawing heatmap legends cleaner display. CellCorHeatmap(): Added legend.position parameter. GSVAPlot(): Added Database column enrichment results consistent downstream filtering. RunMonocle2(): Support custom root cells via root_cells parameter. RunDimsEstimate(): Switched default dimension-selection route scree-based ensemble broken-stick, elbow, cumulative-variance, marginal-gain criteria; previous intrinsicDimension route remains available via method = "intrinsic" can combined method = "ensemble". Added srt_to_h5ad() writing Seurat objects .h5ad files, complementing existing AnnData--Seurat conversion utilities scanpy interoperability. Added RunSciBet() native SciBet-style single-cell annotation reference/query Seurat objects expression matrices, prediction metadata written back Seurat. Added RunRareQ() RareQ rare-cell population detection Seurat objects, including automatic neighbor construction DefaultReduction(), metadata writeback, CellDimPlot() examples, detailed result storage srt@tools[["RareQ"]]. Added FerrisWheelPlot() /gene-count visualization pathway enrichment results pre-summarized count tables, automatic RunEnrichment() result summarization, SCOP palette defaults, scalable outer donuts, title-cased pathway labels, configurable text outlines. Added PalantirTrajectoryPlot() branch-aware Palantir trajectory visualization Seurat embeddings, including pseudotime interval filtering, branch-probability path fitting, optional loess smoothing, branch-selection coloring, layer-return support. Added BranchStreamPlot() branch-aware pseudotime density ribbons cell-state annotations lineage pseudotime columns. Added RunMetaCell() MetaCellPlot() metacell construction, original-cell metacell mapping, metacell count output, Seurat-compatible visualization. Added RunmcRigor() detecting dubious metacells optimizing metacell partition granularity runtime-optional JSB-UCLA/mcRigor installation, metadata writeback, detailed result storage srt@tools[["mcRigor"]]. Added RuntAge() tAge transcriptomic aging-clock prediction Seurat pseudobulk, ExpressionSet, matrix inputs, runtime-optional Gladyshev-Lab/tAge preprocessing, R EN model caching mengxu98/datasets, Python BR fallback support, tAgePlot() visualization thisplot::StatPlot(). Added RunscFEA() scFEA metabolic flux estimation Seurat objects, cached M168 resources mengxu98/datasets, flux balance assays, scFEAHeatmap(), scFEAVolcanoPlot(), scFEABalanceBarPlot() visualization helpers. Added RunAugur() Augur cell-type perturbation prioritization Seurat objects, optimized backend metadata/tool-slot writeback. Added RunCCC() run CellChat, CellphoneDB, LIANA one scheduler rebuild unified srt@tools[["CCC"]] bundle. CCC wrappers now expose backend = c("cpp", "r") scop post-processing plotting-table aggregation preserving upstream package’s inference logic. Added RunSCENIC() SCENIC workflow Seurat objects, including GRNBoost2/scenic ctx execution, regulon conversion, multi-core AUCell batch scoring, storage regulon activity scores Seurat assay plus detailed results @tools. Metacell SCENIC workflows now pass metacell-level object RunMetaCell() directly RunSCENIC() instead using internal group.aggregation path. RunSCENIC() now uses single backend argument select full SCENIC execution path. public motif-fallback, AUCell backend, AUCell C++ strategy, AUCell batch-size switches removed SCENIC wrapper GRNBoost2, cisTarget pruning, AUCell scoring controlled consistently backend = "cpp" backend = "python". Added SCENICPlot() calculate regulon specificity scores SCENIC activity plot top regulons metadata group. SCENICPlot() heatmaps now expose rss_scale, heatmap_limits, heatmap_order, allowing RSS activity heatmaps use matched row-wise z-score color scales stable group-block row ordering requested. Added RunScissor() ScissorPlot() Scissor phenotype-associated cell selection Seurat bulk/SummarizedExperiment inputs, optimized backend, upstream-package backend, Seurat metadata/tool writeback, embedding plots, heatmaps, status-composition summaries. Added RunscTenifoldNet() condition-level scTenifoldNet network comparison matrices Seurat groups using cailab-tamu/scTenifoldNet. RunscTenifoldKnk() now uses optimized path directly QC, network-ensemble construction, tensor denoising, manifold alignment, differential-regulation summaries; scTenifoldKnkPlot() includes QQ, effect-size, network, manifold, volcano, upset result views. Added scTenifoldNetPlot() condition-level scTenifoldNet QQ, effect-size, network, manifold views. Added RunCIBERSORT() ImmuneAbundancePlot() immune cell abundance deconvolution visualization bulk-like expression matrices, C++ benchmarking support lazy optional backend handling. Added NMFHeatmap() cell- feature-level NMF similarity heatmaps optional enrichment annotations progress logging large render jobs. RunPAGA() now supports C++ backend standard PAGA connectivity graph uses default; backend = "python" remains available RNA-velocity transitions, PAGA-initialized embeddings, plotting side effects, DPT pseudotime. RunSCVELO() now includes optimized C++ backend stochastic velocity embedding, compatible VelocityPlot() substantially faster equivalent R reference calculation. Python backend remains default full scVelo workflow. VelocityPlot() raw, grid, stream visualizations validated RunSCVELO(backend = "cpp") velocity embeddings. PrepareEnv() now supports modules = "scenic" standalone Python 3.10 environment (scenic_env default) SCENIC 0.12.1 numpy 1.23.5, avoiding conflicts default scop_env. Added ConvertHomologs() homologous feature conversion Seurat, matrix, Matrix objects. function uses GeneConvert() arbitrary Ensembl/biomaRt-supported species pairs, collapses duplicated target homologs summing expression values, preserves Seurat cell metadata spatial images, stores mapping table @tools$ConvertHomologs. Added RunCytoSPACE(), R/C++ implementation default CytoSPACE spot-level assignment workflow. C++ backend uses spot-capacity graph construction precomputed Pearson correlation matrices, stores detailed results srt@tools[["CytoSPACE"]], writes summary metadata columns requested prefix. Added RunRCTD() RunSPOTlight() spatial deconvolution wrappers estimating spot-level cell-type proportions spatial Seurat objects single-cell references, standardized metadata columns compatible SpatialSpotPlot() standard_scop(spatial_deconv_method = ...). Added RunSpatialEcoTyper() optional SpatialEcoTyper wrapper single-sample discovery, multi-sample conserved SE discovery, pretrained SE recovery, SE abundance deconvolution. Results written back Seurat metadata srt@tools, SpatialEcoTyperSpatialPlot()/SpatialEcoTyperCompositionPlot() provide SCOP-styled visualization helpers. Added RunSpatialGradientFeatures() SpatialGradientPlot() SPATA2-compatible spatial gradient feature screening, including native C++ screening path, trajectory annotation-based screening modes, model-fit summaries, spatial/line/profile visualizations. Added lightweight semla spatial wrappers: RunSemlaSpatialNetwork(), RunSemlaLocalG(), RunSemlaRegionNeighbors(), RunSemlaRadialDistance(). Added Giotto integration helpers spatial workflows, including standalone result wrappers (RunGiottoCluster(), RunGiottoSpatialGenes(), RunGiottoSpatialModules(), RunGiottoCellProximity()), GiottoPlot() result visualizations, SeuratToScopGiotto() / RunGiottoWorkflow() object workflow keeping Giotto results separate Seurat explicitly written back. Added SpatialSpotPlot() spatial visualization, including examples show tissue annotations downstream CytoSPACE assignment results. Added shared C++ progress helper src/log_message.h long-running C++ loops. CytoSPACE assignment, scTenifold tensor decomposition, proportion permutation/bootstrap, sample-level proportion bootstrap now report progress timestamped format thisutils::log_message(). PrepareDB(), RunEnrichment(), RunGSEA(), GeneConvert() now accept Latin species names spaces, dots, hyphens (example, species = "Bos taurus") normalizing package’s underscore form database lookup gene ID conversion. RunSCENIC(): C++ backend now writes final filtered TF list <prefix>_regulators.txt records @tools$SCENIC$files, matching persisted output bundle users expect beside C++ adjacency, regulon list, activity-score files. RunSCENIC(): C++ backend now labels positive regulons TF(+) match pySCENIC naming supports optional negatively correlated regulons TF(-) include_negative_regulons = TRUE. SCENICPlot(): rss_heatmap activity_heatmap now return drawable heatmap plot $plot instead full FeatureHeatmap()/GroupHeatmap() result list, direct PDF export draws heatmap rather printing metadata. SCENICPlot(): plot_type = "rss_rank" now keeps requested top_n highlighted TF labels default label_max_overlaps = Inf; users can lower label_max_overlaps let ggrepel drop crowded labels. RunCytoTRACE(): Default official CytoTRACE2::cytotrace2() R package via backend = "r" keep native scop R/C++ implementation available backend = "cpp". C++ backend remains independent official R package reads model files PrepareDB(db = "CytoTRACE2") default. Added C++ subsample progress thisutils::parallelize_fun(), -memory model-data caching, dense BLAS multiplication near-dense CytoTRACE2 background matrices, C++ rank/log2-CPM preprocessing, top-k-kNN smoothing, fewer exported Rcpp helper entrypoints, official-R-vs-C++ parity/benchmark scripts covering mouse, human, explicit data_dir, multiple data sizes, 1/2/4-core runs. GetAssayData5.Assay5() longer unconditionally calls JoinLayers(), preserving BPCells -disk/lazy layers requested layer can read directly. Methods must materialize BPCells matrices now use explicit warning helpers converting dense matrices dgCMatrix, highlighting memory, tempdir, 2^31-entry risks. Cell-cell communication wrappers now preserve upstream result semantics strictly: RunNichenetr(mode = "aggregate_cluster_de") passes receiver arguments current NicheNet API, RunMultiNichenetr() respects user-provided contrast tables keeping original cell-type labels stored parameters, CellChat plots condition-specific filters read original CellChat object instead cached unified CCC table. RunAugur(): backend = "cpp" path now performs Augur variance random feature selection inside scop, longer requires GitHub-Augur package unless backend = "r" requested. C++ subsample results accumulated row binding reduce repeated table growth, failed C++ cell-type tasks now stop direct result-structure error instead falling secondary missing-metric error. RunPalantir(): Fixed saved plot generation passing plot_format Python, saving embedding matplotlib figure, accepting scalar early_group values "8" selecting starting group. SCENICPlot(): Explicit features SCENIC heatmaps now keep user-supplied regulon order, activity_heatmap aligns feature_split resolved displayed regulons. SCENICPlot(): plot_type = "activity_dim" "activity_violin" now respect explicitly supplied features, instead applying six-regulon default preview limit. SCENICPlot(): plot_type = "target_bar" now respects explicitly supplied features, instead applying four-regulon default preview limit. RunscFEA(): Configure Python thread OpenMP runtime variables dependency checks/imports avoid torch runtime conflicts macOS mixed BLAS environments. scFEAHeatmap(): Use package heatmap palette conventions (RdBu, Chinese, simspec), border/raster defaults, non-clustered group summaries, ht_params overrides closer consistency GroupHeatmap(). GeneSetScoring(): Route dense Gaussian Poisson GSVA scoring C++ KDE path instead immediately falling back sparse-exact scoring, keeping optimized z-score/rank workflow active dense inputs. RunHarmony2(): Added compatibility Harmony 2.0 objects directly trying legacy fields (Z_corr / R) callable methods (getZcorr() / getR()), including module methods listed ls(). srt_append(): Align variable-feature metadata feature name appending existing Assay5 different feature universe, avoiding row-count replacement errors integration workflows. EnrichmentPlot() GSEAPlot(): Resolve database aliases applying group_use, report selected groups enrichment rows directly instead misreporting database missing. RunPalantir(): Avoided macOS/Apple Silicon crash caused umap-learn importing TensorFlow’s ParametricUMAP path Palantir diffusion-map construction. RunCellTypist(): Avoided full AnnData--Seurat roundtrip common metadata-annotation path; RunCellphoneDB() now avoids repeated Python environment checks expands result tables vectorized path. RunCellphoneDB(): Replaced internal manual homolog-expression conversion path ConvertHomologs(), keeping expression-object conversion behavior consistent across package. GeneConvert() examples now direct expression-object homolog conversion ConvertHomologs() instead showing manual geneID_expand aggregation. PrepareDB(): Added compatibility older GOSemSim::godata() signatures use OrgDb instead annoDb, avoiding GO semantic-data preparation failures mixed Bioconductor environments. PrepareDB(): Fixed direct MSigDB subcollection requests db = "MSigDB_H" db = "MSigDB_MH" resolving base MSigDB species metadata selecting Broad release. PrepareDB() AnnotateFeatures(): Normalize legacy MSigDB caches whose feature column stored symbol.ensembl_id, ensure ID-type conversion uses single existing source ID column avoid switch() errors annotating MSigDB features symbol. DEtestPlot(), VolcanoPlot(), DEtestManhattanPlot(), DEtestRingPlot(): Added label.choose automatic top-gene labels adjusted p-value, p-value, detection-rate difference, log2 fold change. Volcano Manhattan plots now keep displayed positions colors tied raw avg_log2FC values, Manhattan plots default vertical jitter allowing centered group track size overridden group_track_width group_track_height. DynamicHeatmap(), FeatureHeatmap(), GroupHeatmap(): Compact long multi-term feature annotations databases MSigDB Reactome drawing heatmap legends, keep DynamicHeatmap() cluster annotations RNA_snn_res.0.8 discrete even stored numeric metadata. Cleaned package-check issues declaring missing namespace imports aligning Rd argument documentation recently updated wrappers. Optional wrapper dependencies checked function entry check_r() instead silently skipping examples adding unnecessary hard dependencies. Updated pkgdown reference grouping spatial analysis, spatial visualization, data conversion, composition-analysis functions. Updated pkgdown reference index CNV, ESTIMATE, SPOTlight, semla, Giotto, spatial-gradient, immune-abundance workflows. Updated RunCytoSPACE() examples use real bundled data, convert mouse reference data ConvertHomologs(), visualize assignment results. Refreshed examples use bundled real package data removed unnecessary dontrun wrappers examples require Python external command-line tools. Added visium_human_pancreas_sub, Visium human pancreas spatial example dataset (GSE254829) spatial image data CODA-derived annotations, spatial analysis. Added Xenium package-data import script preparing curated Xenium example resources outside installed package payload.

title: scop 0.8.9
text: RunGSVA(): Removed redundant dense .matrix() conversion single-cell mode backend = "r"; sparse expression matrices now stay sparse row filtering, reducing peak memory avoiding unnecessary dense materialization. RunCellQC(): Replaced Seurat::SplitObject() lazy cell-name-based subsetting, avoiding full-object duplication per split group. Added caching GetAssay() gene names, GetAssayData5() counts, per-cell QC metrics (nCount / nFeature) outside species-check loop eliminate repeated data extraction. RunDEtest(): Pre-computed cell index mapping (split(names(cell_group), cell_group)) paired-marker tests, replacing per-pair () calls O(1) list lookups. AnnotateFeatures(): Replaced per-detail sapply(… "[") type-stable vapply(…, character(1)) avoid implicit list--character coercion. run_scomm(): Deferred dense conversion reference query subsetting removing premature .matrix() calls; sparse matrices subset first, densified required. RunUMAP2(): Replaced isSymmetric(.matrix(graph)) sparse-aware Matrix::isSymmetric(graph) symmetry checks graph subset sampling, avoiding dense materialization large neighbor graphs. RunUMAP2(): Replaced apply(.matrix(graph), 2, order) uwot-predict path internal C++ sparse column top-k helper (run_sparse_topk_by_column()), avoiding full dense conversion column-wise R-level apply(). RunDimsReduction() (PCA centering): Uses SeuratObject::LayerData(…, features = features) read HVF rows scale.data instead loading full matrix followed manual subsetting. RunMDS(): Removed .matrix() Matrix::t(); proxyC::dist now receives sparse matrix directly, avoiding dense conversion large count matrices. integration.R (fastMNN): Removed three .matrix() calls passed batchelor::fastMNN(), accepts sparse matrices directly via SingleCellExperiment. standard_scop(): Replaced full scale.data matrix load (via GetAssayData5()) direct layer access (SeuratObject::GetAssayData Assay5; @scale.data Assay) retrieve rownames checking whether HVFs scaled, substantially reducing peak memory ScaleData decision step. GetAssayData5.Assay(): Fixed parameter naming use positional matching slot/layer argument, GetAssayData5() correctly retrieves counts, data, scale.data layers Seurat v4 (slot) v5 (layer). Previously named layer argument silently dropped SeuratObject v4, always returning data slot regardless requested layer. CSS_integrate(): Added Assay5 guard SeuratObject::JoinLayers() avoid errors Seurat v4 Assay objects, support layered storage. RunDimsReduction(): Added Seurat v4 fallback PCA centering — SeuratObject::LayerData(…, features = …) Assay5-; v4 Assay objects now use GetAssayData5() manual feature subsetting. integration_scop(): Added early detection v5-integration methods (CCA, RPCA, fastMNN5, Harmony5, scVI5) provide clear, actionable error message used Seurat v4 Assay objects, rather failing deep call stack. Added loom_to_srt() pure-R loom--Seurat conversion via rhdf5, preserving velocity spliced unspliced layers assays without initializing Python, added Python-backed loom_to_adata() users need AnnData output. Added RunBulk() unified bulk-strategy entrypoint method-vector selection bulk DE, deconvolution, cell-type-specific DE workflows. Added method-specific bulk runners de_limma_voom, de_edgeR_qlf, de_DESeq2, de_dream, deconv_MuSiC, deconv_BisqueRNA, deconv_BayesPrism, csde_TOAST. Standardized bulk results Bulk$results$de, Bulk$results$deconv, Bulk$results$csde, keeping DE outputs compatible existing DEtestPlot(), RunEnrichment(), RunGSEA(), GroupHeatmap(), FeatureHeatmap() data flows. RunBulk(run_enrichment = TRUE, run_gsea = TRUE) now filters bulk DE rows pathway thresholds mirrors successful pathway results Enrichment_Bulk_wilcox GSEA_Bulk_wilcox, EnrichmentPlot() GSEAPlot() can read standard srt@tools contract. Deconvolution CSDE bundles now record computational engine details; current deconvolution runners use explicit backend = "internal" SCOP profile fitting csde_TOAST uses explicit backend = "limma_interaction", package backends can wired later without pretending call external packages. Added explicit Remotes entries mengxu98/thisplot mengxu98/thisutils source installs can resolve minimum imported versions required SCOP. Optional bulk engines DESeq2 variancePartition installed demand check_r() called lazily get_namespace_fun(). Added method_args expose method-specific tuning parameters without expanding public API surface.

title: scop 0.8.8
text: Updated minimum dependency versions thisplot (>= 0.3.8) thisutils (>= 0.4.5), removed local copies helpers now provided upstream (thisplot::annotate_quadrants(), thisplot::clip_symmetric_range(), thisutils::collapse_sparse_rows()). Updated pkgdown reference grouping cell-cycle workflow. Added optional wrappers RunDorothea(), RunBayesSpace(), experimental RunscTenifoldKnk(). RunscTenifoldKnk() keeps upstream scTenifoldNet workflow fixes QC gene-filter assignment local path, uses equivalent covariance/downdate path direct sparse matrix construction, selection-based quantile thresholding, controlled per-gene eigensolver parallelism large pcNet() network construction, uses C++ helpers tensor decomposition, manifold matrix construction, directionality, differential-regulation distance calculations. C++ tensor-decomposition path now computes MTTKRP updates directly instead materializing four dense unfolding matrices. PrepareEnv(): Added explicit support mamba micromamba executables addition conda, including command-name resolution, automatic package-managed micromamba download conda = "micromamba" requested command PATH, manager-aware logging, micromamba env path detection, ToS handling runs standard conda. Package-managed micromamba environments now use -space cache root avoid micromamba run -p path parsing failures. PrepareEnv() now also stops early reticulate already initialized different Python executable, avoiding unsafe -session switches conda micromamba. Python stack now also pins setuptools < 81 legacy packages trimap can still import pkg_resources. PrepareEnv(): default modules = NULL environment longer includes scomm; install explicitly modules = "scomm" TensorFlow/scOMM stack conflicts default JAX/scVI stack incompatible ml-dtypes requirements. CheckDataList() / standard_scop(): Removed unnecessary -feature ScaleData() call immediately LogNormalize. Downstream workflows still scale selected HVFs PCA, large raw-count inputs longer create dense -gene scale.data intermediate checking. srt_reorder(): Replaced per-cluster repeated sparse subsetting rowMeans() single sparse group-membership matrix multiplication, speeding cluster-reordering step used standard_scop() preserving average expression values. FindExpressedMarkers(): Added sparse fold-change detection-rate prefilter path common sparse RNA inputs, avoiding dense -feature expression materialization marker filtering preserving default results. Supplied features now intersected active layer dense fallback scoring, also keeps scale.data partial-feature layers passing absent rows fold-change calculation. C++-accelerated backends now default available: RunMetabolism(), RunGSVA(), CellScoring(), RunDynamicEnrichment(), RunEnrichment() now prefer backend = "cpp" retaining backend = "r" exact legacy/package behavior. RunPermutation() now uses validated C++ implementation directly. RunMetabolism() RunGSVA(): Added reusable C++ gene-set scoring backend ssGSEA, zscore, plage; RunGSVA() can now use backend = "cpp" method = "ssgsea", method = "zscore", method = "plage", Gaussian- Poisson-kernel method = "gsva". PLAGE scores oriented gene set mean z-score avoid backend-dependent sign flips. RunMetabolism() RunGSVA(): Added cpp_chunk_size C++ GSVA kernel paths reduce peak dense intermediate memory large cell counts; NULL now auto-selects chunk size large matrices. RunEnrichment(): Added experimental backend = "cpp" ORA path using C++ hypergeometric implementation faster enrichment tables keeping backend = "r" available clusterProfiler-compatible path. CellScoring(): Added experimental backend = "cpp" support Seurat module scoring keeping control-gene sampling R moving sparse mean calculations C++ code. RunPermutation(): Uses C++ permutation bootstrap loops directly validating match legacy R calculation observed fractions log2 fold-differences running substantially faster. RunUMAP2(): Added internal C++ sparse column top-k helper Graph inputs speed extraction precomputed neighbor indices/connectivities calling uwot. RunKNNMap() RunKNNPredict(): Added internal C++ dense column top-k helper raw KNN fallback speed nearest-neighbor extraction precomputed distance matrices. PseudotimeProjectionPlot(): Reused internal dense top-k helper pseudotime KNN/gradient neighbor extraction distance matrices. Mapping/integration metrics: Added internal C++ contingency-table helper metric_accuracy(), metric_macro_f1(), metric_purity(), metric_nmi(), metric_ari(), metric_weighted_recall(), collect_mapping_metrics(). RunMetabolism(): Added C++ backend method = "GSVA" keeps Poisson-kernel GSVA scoring path accelerates repeated count-kernel calculations. RunMetabolism() CellScoring(): Added experimental C++ backend AUCell scoring via backend = "cpp" selectable cpp_strategy values ("sparse", "topk", "full"), keeping original R/AUCell implementation available via backend = "r" exact package output. RunDynamicEnrichment() now passes backend AUCell-based scoring. CellScoring(method = "AUCell"): Fixed score-name assignment one feature list scored, avoiding vector dropping metadata column names applied. RunMetabolism(method = "VISION"): Fixed signature construction -memory gene sets passed VISION::Signature objects instead interpreted file paths. DynamicHeatmap() / custom enrichment workflows: Fixed incorrect term label display user-provided TERM2GENE / TERM2NAME use non-standard column names term / name. Custom term annotations now normalized consistently heatmap term labels show readable term names instead fallback IDs (e.g. GO IDs). Related issue #160 (@Pineapple-wen6, @mengxu98). Refactored repeated custom database input handling introducing shared internal helpers normalizing assembling user-provided TERM2GENE / TERM2NAME, applied across RunEnrichment(), RunDynamicEnrichment(), RunGSEA(), RunGSVA(), PrepareDB() keep behavior consistent. integration_scop(): Improved ChromatinAssay handling standardizing ATAC reductions integration, avoiding non-interactive small-batch blocking, clipping TFIDF/rlsi anchor dims available cells, auto-switching Harmony5 legacy Harmony, rejecting unsupported Seurat / RPCA ATAC paths explicit messages.

title: scop 0.8.7
text: Added RunDimsEstimate() DimsEstimatePlot() intrinsic dimensionality estimation reductions, integrated RunDimsReduction() standard_scop() automatically select useful dimensions linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL. Renamed RunDimReduction() RunDimsReduction() updated downstream callers/documentation accordingly. standard_scop(): linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL, now uses estimated dimensions stored reduction (via RunDimsEstimate()) available, fallback first 50 dimensions. Added Seurat v5 integration methods: CCA_integrate(), RPCA_integrate(), fastMNN5_integrate(), Harmony5_integrate(), scVI5_integrate() via Seurat::IntegrateLayers(), exposed integration_scop(). Added Coralysis_integrate() exposed Coralysis integration_scop(), following official Seurat v5 compatible workflow via SingleCellExperiment. Added h5ad_to_srt() reading .h5ad files directly Seurat objects via scanpy.read_h5ad(), automatic CSR/float64 coercion avoid reticulate conversion issues. Layers fail conversion gracefully skipped reported. adata_to_srt(): Improved robustness layer conversion — layer now wrapped tryCatch() individual failures longer abort entire conversion; skipped layers reported warnings. RunCellChat(): Enhanced support condition-specific analyses pairwise merged comparisons via group_column group_cmp parameters. Added RunCellphoneDB() running CellphoneDB cell-cell communication analysis Seurat object official Python package, support species conversion results stored srt@tools[["CellphoneDB"]]. Added RunNichenetr() RunMultiNichenetr() running NicheNet MultiNicheNet analysis Seurat objects standardized result storage. Added unified cell-cell communication plotting functions CCCStatPlot(), CCCHeatmap(), CCCNetworkPlot() CellChat, CellphoneDB, NicheNet, MultiNicheNet results. Remove CellChatPlot(). RunUMAP2(): Fixed reduction lookup check existing reduction names falling back DefaultReduction(), avoiding errors exact reduction name already present.

title: scop 0.8.6
text: Added RunGSVA() gene set variation analysis GSVAPlot() visualization GSVA results. Related issue #146 (@mengxu98). Added RunMetabolism() single-cell metabolism pathway scoring support AUCell, GSVA, ssGSEA, optional VISION, MetabolismPlot() visualization RunMetabolism() now uses scMetabolism KEGG / Reactome metabolism pathway definitions identify metabolism-related terms, rebuilds pathway gene sets updated PrepareDB() annotations, enabling cached database updates cross-species metabolism scoring. Related issue #146 (@mengxu98). Added RunDecontX() integrated optional decontX ambient RNA decontamination RunCellQC(), including contamination metadata, optional decontaminated assay output, threshold-based QC filtering. Related issue #147 (@mengxu98). FeatureStatPlot(): Fixed duplicated X/Y axis titles main title stack = TRUE theme_args title. Stack assembly now strips axis plot titles non-edge panels draws single shared ylab/title via gtable; theme styling theme_args (e.g. axis.title.y, title/plot.title) applied shared grobs. Related issue #145 (@PanSX-Dr). Updated README badge/logo. Removed example datasets ifnb_sub, ref_scHCL, ref_scZCL.

title: scop 0.8.5
text: Default palette changed "Paired" "Chinese". See thisplot::ChineseColors() details. Unified cores parameter across multiple functions (DynamicHeatmap(), FeatureHeatmap(), GroupHeatmap(), heatmap_enrichment()), ensuring cores correctly threaded RunEnrichment(). RunMonocle2() RunMonocle3(): Added xlab ylab parameters, passed internal CellDimPlot() FeatureDimPlot() calls. ListDB(): Now supports multiple species species parameter simultaneously adds Species DB columns output data frame clearer identification. Moved is_outlier thisutils::is_outlier(). configure_apple_silicon_env() (Python function): Added OpenMP compatibility handling macOS arm64 prepending environment lib paths DYLD_FALLBACK_LIBRARY_PATH/DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH preloading libomp.dylib/libiomp5.dylib via ctypes.CDLL(..., RTLD_GLOBAL) reduce scanpy/python-igraph import conflicts. scVI_integrate(): Unified parameter naming renaming num_threads cores consistency across integration functions. Added find_neighbors_and_clusters() run_nonlinear_reduction() helper functions unify operations across integration functions reduce redundant code. TF database now uses AnimalTFDB4 data source. MP database - Web Archive URL year now dynamically determined current date, archive snapshot date MP-related file downloads (VOC_MammalianPhenotype.rpt, MGI_Gene_Model_Coord.rpt, MGI_GenePheno.rpt) extracted server index page ensure consistent versioning. hTFtarget data download URL changed "http://bioinfo.life.hust.edu.cn/static/hTFtarget/file_download/tf-target-infomation.txt" "https://guolab.wchscu.cn/static/hTFtarget/file_download/tf-target-infomation.txt". CSPA data download URL changed "https://wlab.ethz.ch/cspa/data/S1_File.xlsx" "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mengxu98/CSPA/main/S1_File.xlsx". Migrated rliger 2.x workflow (rliger::runIntegration() + rliger::quantileNorm() Seurat object) now prepares/uses ligerScaleData layer via rliger::scaleNotCenter() integration. Updated argument naming LIGER_dims_use liger_dims_use, removed legacy quantile-normalization parameter compatibility mapping (ref_dataset), keeping reference supported interface. Optimized installation Python packages Apple Silicon devices. Updated README example code visualizations. regenerating figures, package size reduced ~3 MB.

title: scop 0.8.4
text: FeatureStatPlot() / ExpressionStatPlot(): Fixed box violin x-axis misalignment add_box = TRUE split.. Groups fewer 2 observations now filtered violin density estimation (warning), violin layer uses consistent position_dodge(width = 0.9) match boxplot. Related issue #123 (@oranges7).

title: scop 0.8.3
text: RunDynamicFeatures(): Added PreTSA method dynamic feature fitting. PreTSA algorithm scop re implemented support parallelization higher performance. Original research: PreTSA: computationally efficient modeling temporal spatial gene expression patterns. Use fit_method = "pretsa" B-spline-based piecewise truncated spline analysis; fit_method = "gam" (default) keeps generalized additive models. PreTSA supports knot (0 "auto") max_knot_allowed knot = "auto". Relate issue #133. CellDimPlot() FeatureDimPlot(): Added legend.title parameter (default NULL) control legend title. NULL, default titles used (e.g. group name CellDimPlot, feature empty FeatureDimPlot). ExpressionStatPlot() FeatureStatPlot(): Added legend.title parameter (default NULL) single-legend plots. NULL, default title (e.g. keynm feature/group name) used. FeatureStatPlot() forwards legend.title ExpressionStatPlot(). Moved StatPlot function thisplot::StatPlot. Differential expression plots (VolcanoPlot(), DEtestManhattanPlot(), DEtestRingPlot()): added .pos = TRUE positive-visualization. DEtestManhattanPlot() now keeps cell-type track centered y = 0 sizes track nearest point distance around zero. DynamicHeatmap() / heatmap_enrichment(): Fixed incorrect db handling using custom TERM2GENE/TERM2NAME. Enrichment results Database = "custom" incorrectly filtered default db values (e.g. "GO_BP"), causing false “term enriched using threshold” warnings even enrichment succeeded. Relate issue #133 (@1228849000).

title: scop 0.8.2
text: Add DEtestPlot() function, calls original VolcanoPlot() adds two plot types, Manhattan Ring, controlled plot_type parameter (c("volcano", "manhattan", "ring"), default "volcano"). Add standalone functions DEtestManhattanPlot() DEtestRingPlot() direct use. Relate issue #121 (@ericavalentini). Differential expression visualization (DEtestPlot(), VolcanoPlot(), DEtestManhattanPlot(), DEtestRingPlot()): added res parameter accept existing DE results (data.frame). res provided, srt ignored. Data processing supports: (1) group1 cluster column grouped plots; (2) grouping column single panel; (3) gene names row names gene column missing. Relate issue #129 (@mengxu98). PrepareEnv(): Update version parameter specify Python version conda environment. Default "3.11-1" Windows "3.10-1" macOS Unix. Relate issue #103 (@PanSX-Dr). RunNMF(): Add cores parameter RunNMF() optimize printed message. Removed setting Python functions prevents drawing functions causing R crashes. RunPalantir(): Fixed unused plot_format parameter error. parameter now properly excluded arguments passed Python functions. Relate issue #126 (@christinejay990202-dev).

title: scop 0.8.1
text: FeatureHeatmap(): Fixed group_palcolor named vector passed: function previously used first color groups group_palcolor[[1]] vector returns single element. Now group.length 1, vector automatically wrapped list; within_groups = TRUE, group_palcolor expanded line group_palette. GroupHeatmap(): group_palcolor fix FeatureHeatmap(): support named-vector input correct expansion within_groups = TRUE. group_by modified group.unify documentation, involving functions: RunCellRank(), RunDEtest(), VolcanoPlot(), RunEnrichment(), EnrichmentPlot(), RunGSEA(), GSEAPlot(), RunPalantir(), RunPAGA(), RunWOT(), RunSCVELO(), releated #120.

title: scop 0.8.0
text: RunMonocle2(): New function performing Monocle2 trajectory analysis support various dimensionality reduction methods (DDRTree, ICA, tSNE, SimplePPT, L1-graph, SGL-tree). Uses fixed version monocle2 mengxu98/monocle. RunMonocle3(): New function performing Monocle3 trajectory analysis support cell ordering, trajectory learning, pseudotime computation. RunCytoTRACE(): New scop implementation running CytoTRACE 2 analysis predict cellular potency scores categories (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) support human mouse species. CytoTRACEPlot(): New function visualizing CytoTRACE 2 analysis results.

title: scop 0.7.9
text: Optimized @inheritParams usage reduce redundant parameter definitions. Unified parameter naming: renamed group_by group.consistency Seurat conventions RunMonocle3(), RunPalantir(), RunSCVELO(), RunWOT(), CellCorHeatmap(), RunDynamicFeatures().

title: scop 0.7.8
text: RunPalantir(): Fixed unused plot_format parameter error. parameter now properly excluded arguments passed Python functions. Relate issue #114 (@Moonerss). RunSCVELO(): Fixed PAGA computation error replacing scv.tl.paga sc.tl.paga (scanpy implementation) better stability. function now uses PAGA implementation RunPAGA() function. RunCellRank(): Fixed GPCCA Schur decomposition error adding fallback mechanism. brandts method fails “subspace_angles” error, function automatically tries krylov method. methods fail, automatically switches CFLARE estimator robust computation. RunCellRank(): Fixed recover_dynamics error ensuring velocity_graph velocity_graph_neg properly set calling scv.tl.recover_dynamics() latent time computation. adata_to_srt(): Removed automatic removal “X_” prefix dimensionality reduction names obsm keys. function now preserves original reduction names stored AnnData objects. Reducing size pancreas_sub example dataset.

title: scop 0.7.7
text: adata_to_srt(): Enhanced support multiple AnnData object types including Python AnnData objects (scanpy/reticulate), R6 AnnData objects anndata package (AnnDataR6), R6 AnnData objects anndataR package (InMemoryAnnData). Added internal helper functions get_adata_element() get_adata_names() better compatibility. Relate issues #67 (@lisch7), #91 (@mengxu98) commit91#issuecomment. RunDEtest(): Fixed error comparing one cluster multiple clusters using group1 group2 parameters. Relate issue #111 (@zhaoxiaoyan9225). AnnotateFeatures(): Fixed bug function fail processing GTF file annotations due column name matching issues data naming. function now correctly handles column name intersections merging annotation data.

title: scop 0.7.6
text: RunDM(): Added automatic PCA-based dimensionality reduction using many features (>1000) speed diffusion map computation. npcs parameter can used control number principal components used pre-processing.

title: scop 0.7.5
text: CellScoring(): Fixed bug function failed build results. Relate issue #98 (@SuperrNaruto). RunDEtest(): Fixed compatibility issue SeuratObject 5.0.0+ replacing deprecated Assays() slot argument LayerData(). Relate issue #100 (@mattizecos). RunDM(): Added automatic PCA-based dimensionality reduction using many features (>1000) speed diffusion map computation. npcs parameter can used control number principal components used pre-processing.

title: scop 0.7.3
text: RunCellTypist(): New function cell type annotation using CellTypist method. CellTypistModels(): New function downloading managing CellTypist pre-trained models.

title: scop 0.7.2
text: RunCellRank(): Performance optimizations code improvements.

title: scop 0.7.1
text: CellDimPlot(): Fixed issue NA values appeared labels. Relate issue #93 (@12345nkjil).

title: scop 0.7.0
text: PrepareEnv(): Integrated uv primary Python package installer improved installation speed. check_python(): Now uses uv primary installation tool pip fallback, significantly improving package installation speed. Added find_uv() install_uv() internal functions managing uv package manager installation detection.

title: scop 0.6.6
text: Standardized return value tags: Changed @returns @return consistency. Unified parameter documentation: Replaced \code{value} Markdown backticks `value` format. Standardized default value descriptions. Added @md tags: Added @md tags functions using Markdown syntax documentation. Enhanced cross-references: Added @seealso links related functions appropriate.

title: scop 0.6.5
text: Added comprehensive environment variable configuration prevent crashes calling Python functions, including setting thread limits OMP, OPENBLAS, MKL, NUMBA, libraries. improves stability platforms, especially Apple silicon Macs. Added accept_conda_tos() function automatically accept conda Terms Service required channels, improving conda environment setup process. Fixed conda Terms Service acceptance issue PrepareEnv(). function now automatically accepts conda Terms Service required channels, eliminating need manual acceptance. addresses issue reported #85. Multiple Python-based functions (RunPAGA, RunSCVELO, RunPalantir, RunCellRank, RunWOT, RunPHATE, RunPaCMAP, RunTriMap): Enhanced message formatting code improvements. PrepareSCExplorer(): Fixed package version dependency issues shiny bslib compatibility. function now properly handles bslib theme configuration work shiny 1.6.0 1.7.0+, addressing compatibility errors reported #87. Improved code formatting consistency across multiple functions. Enhanced Python functions inst/python/functions.py better error handling message formatting. Updated documentation multiple functions reflect code improvements.

title: scop 0.6.2
text: CellChatPlot(): Adjusted size saved figures better file size optimization. Updated README.md remove references Monocle2 Monocle3 (deprecated functions).

title: scop 0.6.1
text: PrepareEnv(): Improved message formatting simplified log output better user experience. Added get_conda_envs_dir() helper function centralize conda environment directory retrieval. integration_scop(): Enhanced integration_method parameter definition explicit method list better code clarity. Moved exist_python_pkgs() function check_package.R better code organization. Replaced direct conda_info()$envs_dirs[1] calls get_conda_envs_dir() helper function consistency. RunSCExplorer(): Updated use thisplot::palette_list thisplot::slim_data() instead scop::palette_list scop::slim_data(). Added thisplot dependency checks RunSCExplorer(). Updated documentation across multiple functions.

title: scop 0.6.0
text: PrepareEnv(): Enhanced environment caching mechanism avoid redundant environment preparation. Improved message formatting error handling. Python-based functions (RunPAGA(), RunSCVELO(), RunPalantir(), RunCellRank(), RunWOT()) now automatically call PrepareEnv() internally, eliminating need users manually prepare Python environment using functions. cluster_within_group2(): New function clustering within groups. Multiple plotting functions: Replaced geom_sankey() ggsankey::geom_sankey() better Sankey diagram support. Multiple functions: Replaced ::: operator get_namespace_fun() safer namespace access. Removed RunMonocle() function related documentation (RunMonocle2.Rd, RunMonocle3.Rd). Removed projection_functions.R file (functions moved locations). Replaced custom theme functions thisplot::theme_this() (exported theme_scop()). Replaced direct log_message() calls thisutils::log_message() consistency. Removed palette_list data object. Moved cli Suggests Imports better message formatting support. Added thisplot Imports theme utility functions. Added ggsankey Suggests Sankey diagram support. Added remote dependencies: theislab/destiny, mengxu98/thisplot. Removed unused dependencies: Biobase, BiocGenerics, concaveman, DDRTree, glmGamPoi, hexbin, monocle, png, ragg, tidyr. Updated documentation across multiple functions reflect code refactoring. Improved code organization maintainability.

title: scop 0.5.5
text: Fixed VelocityPlot() function error plot_type = "grid" mode: replaced vectorized arrow length fixed-length arrows (using mean length) resolve vapply() error occurred grid::arrow() received vector instead single value, see #72, #74.

title: scop 0.5.4
text: Fixed parameter name error CheckDataType() function calls: changed data parameter object RunKNNMap(), RunSymphonyMap(), RunScmap(), RunPCAMap(), RunSingleR() functions, see #68. Fixed SingleCellExperiment object creation RunScmap() RunSingleR() functions: changed coercing SummarizedExperiment directly constructing SingleCellExperiment objects.

title: scop 0.5.3
text: PrepareDB(): Changed default Ensembl_version parameter 103 NULL flexible version handling. Added Python version log_message() Python-based functions (RunSCVELO(), RunPAGA(), RunPalantir(), RunCellRank(), RunWOT()) added verbose parameter inheritance improved message formatting cli formatting. Delete harmonizomeapi.py file. Move scop_analysis.py single functions.py file inst/python/ better code organization maintainability. Improved parameter documentation consistency.

title: scop 0.5.1
text: Improved reference formatting consistency across multiple functions. Enhanced documentation clarity readability.

title: scop 0.5.0
text: RunCellChat(): New function perform CellChat analysis investigating cell--cell communication support human, mouse, zebrafish species. CellChatPlot(): New function visualize CellChat analysis results various plot types customization options. Multiple integration functions: Improved error messages message formatting better user experience. Added CellChat package dependency remote repository jinworks/CellChat. Updated README.md improved code formatting examples. Enhanced documentation cell communication analysis functions. Improved error messages user guidance across integration functions. Removed example figures optimize package installation size.

title: scop 0.4.0
text: RunProportionTest(): New function perform Monte-carlo permutation test quantifying cell proportion differences conditions. ProportionTestPlot(): New function generate proportion test plots customizable significance thresholds visualization options. Multiple Python-based functions: add \dontrun{} blocks Github workfolw checking. Added comprehensive documentation new proportion testing functions. Enhanced example documentation across multiple functions. Updated package documentation examples.

text: Updated workflow examples function documentation.

title: scop 0.3.3

title: scop 0.3.2
text: GetFeaturesData() AddFeaturesData(): Enhanced argument clarity, added input validation, standardized return values Seurat, Assay, Assay5 objects. Renamed parameters: query_cell_annotation → query_annotation, ref_cell_annotation → ref_annotation. Improved error message formatting cli formatting. Simplified variable assignments improved readability. Comprehensive documentation updates across multiple functions including AnnotateFeatures, CellDimPlot, CellStatPlot, FeatureStatPlot, GroupHeatmap, RunCellQC, others. Improved parameter descriptions function clarity.

title: scop 0.3.1
text: EnrichmentPlot() GSEAPlot(): Removed conditional font face styling (face = ifelse() logic) better text rendering consistency. Set default value lineheight 0.5 0.7. Updated check_r() function improved package checking functionality. Updated reexports functionality. Updated documentation formatting consistency.

title: scop 0.3.0
text: Fixed segmentation faults R crashes M-series MacBook running Python functions. RunPAGA(): Enhanced M-series MacBook detection automatic environment configuration. RunSCVELO(): Added ARM64-specific optimizations prevent crashes ensure stable execution. RunCellRank(): Implemented M-series compatibility proper NUMBA configuration. RunPalantir(): Added ARM64 support single-threaded execution mode. RunWOT(): Enhanced M-series MacBook environment variable settings. RunTriMap(): Added M-series MacBook compatibility dimensionality reduction. RunPaCMAP(): Implemented ARM64-specific environment configuration. RunPHATE(): Added M-series MacBook support non-linear dimensionality reduction. RunCellQC(): Enhanced scrublet doubletdetection functions ARM64 compatibility. Updated function documentation reflect M-series MacBook compatibility. Added technical notes ARM64 architecture considerations.

Delete lifemap data, including: lifemap_cell, lifemap_compartment lifemap_organ. Reconstructed sample data panc8_sub pancreas_sub, retaining basic Seurat object.
